---
name: Feature request
about: A capability HQ should ship or expose
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
  HQ is a template — prefer changes that make the template more useful
  to the 80% of forks. Very domain-specific asks may be better solved
  as a module in your own fork.

  For bigger asks, please check CONTRIBUTING.md and open an issue before
  sending a PR so we can align on shape.
-->

## The problem

What's awkward, slow, or missing today? A concrete story beats an
abstract request.

## Proposed shape

What should exist? A function signature, a doc link, a UI sketch —
whatever makes the ask concrete.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you try or think about? Why didn't it work?

## Who benefits

Is this useful to most HQ forks, or just to a specific domain? Both
are OK, but the answer shapes where it lands (platform vs. example
module vs. your own fork).

## Anything else

Links, prior art in other tools, relevant issues.
